positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a glowing constellation map interwoven with geometric floral elements. The primary subject is a central, swirling galaxy motif surrounded by delicate, abstract botanical forms like crescent moons and stylized leaves. Use a palette of deep indigo, celestial turquoise, and shimmering gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, creating a strong, repeatable silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Focus on clean lines, high contrast between the luminous elements and the dark background, and an ethereal, cosmic aesthetic. Vector illustration quality, linocut style meets bioluminescence, graphic design perfect for screen printing, solid background.
